---
title: "Code Task_1"
author: "Yuxin Shen"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
install.packages(c("tidyverse", "readxl", "janitor", "stringr"))
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
bea_files <- list.files("raw_data/bea", full.names = TRUE)
bea_files
```
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)

bea_file <- "raw_data/bea/CAINC1__ALL_AREAS_1969_2024.csv"

bea_raw <- read_csv(bea_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

names(bea_raw)

bea_raw <- bea_raw %>% clean_names()

names(bea_raw)

# keep what we needed
bea_sub <- bea_raw %>%
  filter(line_code %in% c(1, 2, 3))

# change to longtable
bea_long <- bea_sub %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = matches("^x\\d{4}$"),
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(str_remove(year, "^x")),
    value = as.numeric(value)
  )

# change line_code
bea_long <- bea_long %>%
  mutate(
    variable = case_when(
      line_code == 1 ~ "income",
      line_code == 2 ~ "population",
      line_code == 3 ~ "income_per_capita",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )

bea_panel <- bea_long %>%
  select(geo_fips, geo_name, year, variable, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = variable,
    values_from = value
  )

glimpse(bea_panel)
head(bea_panel)
bea_panel %>%
  distinct(geo_fips, geo_name) %>%
  slice(1:30)
```

```{r}
## BEA part:
bea_county <- bea_panel %>%
  mutate(
    geo_fips = str_trim(geo_fips),
    state_fips = str_sub(geo_fips, 1, 2),
    county_fips = str_sub(geo_fips, 3, 5)
  ) %>%
  filter(
    nchar(geo_fips) == 5,
    geo_fips != "00000",
    county_fips != "000"
  )


state_lookup <- tribble(
  ~state_fips, ~state_name,
  "01", "Alabama",
  "02", "Alaska",
  "04", "Arizona",
  "05", "Arkansas",
  "06", "California",
  "08", "Colorado",
  "09", "Connecticut",
  "10", "Delaware",
  "11", "District of Columbia",
  "12", "Florida",
  "13", "Georgia",
  "15", "Hawaii",
  "16", "Idaho",
  "17", "Illinois",
  "18", "Indiana",
  "19", "Iowa",
  "20", "Kansas",
  "21", "Kentucky",
  "22", "Louisiana",
  "23", "Maine",
  "24", "Maryland",
  "25", "Massachusetts",
  "26", "Michigan",
  "27", "Minnesota",
  "28", "Mississippi",
  "29", "Missouri",
  "30", "Montana",
  "31", "Nebraska",
  "32", "Nevada",
  "33", "New Hampshire",
  "34", "New Jersey",
  "35", "New Mexico",
  "36", "New York",
  "37", "North Carolina",
  "38", "North Dakota",
  "39", "Ohio",
  "40", "Oklahoma",
  "41", "Oregon",
  "42", "Pennsylvania",
  "44", "Rhode Island",
  "45", "South Carolina",
  "46", "South Dakota",
  "47", "Tennessee",
  "48", "Texas",
  "49", "Utah",
  "50", "Vermont",
  "51", "Virginia",
  "53", "Washington",
  "54", "West Virginia",
  "55", "Wisconsin",
  "56", "Wyoming"
)

bea_county <- bea_county %>%
  mutate(
    county_name = str_trim(word(geo_name, 1, sep = fixed(",")))
  ) %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = "state_fips")


bea_clean <- bea_county %>%
  select(
    state_name,
    county_name,
    state_fips,
    county_fips,
    year,
    income,
    population,
    income_per_capita
  ) %>%
  arrange(state_fips, county_fips, year)

print(head(bea_clean, 10))

dup_check <- bea_clean %>%
  count(state_fips, county_fips, year) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

print(dup_check)

year_check <- bea_clean %>%
  summarise(
    min_year = min(year, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_year = max(year, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(year_check)

n_counties <- bea_clean %>%
  distinct(state_fips, county_fips) %>%
  nrow()

print(n_counties)

write_csv(bea_clean, "output/bea_county_panel.csv")
```

```{r}

bls_files <- list.files(
  "raw_data/bls",
  full.names = TRUE
) %>%
  discard(~ str_detect(basename(.x), "^~\\$")) %>%
  keep(~ str_detect(basename(.x), "^laucnty\\d{2}\\.xlsx$|^laucnty\\d{2}\\.xls$"))

print(bls_files)


clean_bls_file <- function(file_path) {
  
  df_raw <- read_excel(file_path, col_names = FALSE)
  
  # row 2 contains the actual headers
  new_names <- df_raw %>%
    slice(2) %>%
    unlist(use.names = FALSE) %>%
    as.character()
  
  df <- df_raw %>%
    slice(-(1:2))
  
  names(df) <- make.names(new_names, unique = TRUE)
  df <- df %>% clean_names()
  
  # extract year from the file name
  yy <- str_extract(basename(file_path), "\\d{2}") %>% as.integer()
  file_year <- if_else(yy <= 24, 2000L + yy, 1900L + yy)
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      state_fips_code = str_pad(as.character(state_fips_code), 2, pad = "0"),
      county_fips_code = str_pad(as.character(county_fips_code), 3, pad = "0"),
      year = as.integer(year),
      labor_force = parse_number(as.character(labor_force)),
      employed = parse_number(as.character(employed)),
      unemployed = parse_number(as.character(unemployed)),
      unemployment_rate = parse_number(as.character(unemployment_rate)),
      year_from_file = file_year
    ) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(state_fips_code),
      !is.na(county_fips_code)
    )
  
  return(df)
}


bls_all <- map_dfr(bls_files, clean_bls_file)

# quick check: reported year should match file year
year_match_check <- bls_all %>%
  summarise(all_match = all(year == year_from_file, na.rm = TRUE))

print(year_match_check)


state_lookup <- tribble(
  ~state_fips, ~state_name,
  "01", "Alabama",
  "02", "Alaska",
  "04", "Arizona",
  "05", "Arkansas",
  "06", "California",
  "08", "Colorado",
  "09", "Connecticut",
  "10", "Delaware",
  "11", "District of Columbia",
  "12", "Florida",
  "13", "Georgia",
  "15", "Hawaii",
  "16", "Idaho",
  "17", "Illinois",
  "18", "Indiana",
  "19", "Iowa",
  "20", "Kansas",
  "21", "Kentucky",
  "22", "Louisiana",
  "23", "Maine",
  "24", "Maryland",
  "25", "Massachusetts",
  "26", "Michigan",
  "27", "Minnesota",
  "28", "Mississippi",
  "29", "Missouri",
  "30", "Montana",
  "31", "Nebraska",
  "32", "Nevada",
  "33", "New Hampshire",
  "34", "New Jersey",
  "35", "New Mexico",
  "36", "New York",
  "37", "North Carolina",
  "38", "North Dakota",
  "39", "Ohio",
  "40", "Oklahoma",
  "41", "Oregon",
  "42", "Pennsylvania",
  "44", "Rhode Island",
  "45", "South Carolina",
  "46", "South Dakota",
  "47", "Tennessee",
  "48", "Texas",
  "49", "Utah",
  "50", "Vermont",
  "51", "Virginia",
  "53", "Washington",
  "54", "West Virginia",
  "55", "Wisconsin",
  "56", "Wyoming"
)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Standardize county names
# Use FIPS as the actual merge key; names are labels only
# ---------------------------------------------------------

clean_county_name <- function(x) {
  x %>%
    str_remove(",\\s*[A-Z]{2}$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+County$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+Parish$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+Borough$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+Census Area$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+Municipality$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+City and Borough$") %>%
    str_remove("\\s+city and borough$") %>%
    str_trim()
}


bls_clean <- bls_all %>%
  transmute(
    state_fips = state_fips_code,
    county_fips = county_fips_code,
    county_name = clean_county_name(county_name_state_abbreviation),
    year = year,
    unemployment_rate = unemployment_rate
  ) %>%
  filter(
    county_fips != "000"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    county_name = str_trim(county_name)
  ) %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = "state_fips") %>%
  select(
    state_name,
    county_name,
    state_fips,
    county_fips,
    year,
    unemployment_rate
  ) %>%
  arrange(state_fips, county_fips, year)

# ---------------------------------------------------------
# Checks
# ---------------------------------------------------------

print(head(bls_clean, 10))

dup_check_bls <- bls_clean %>%
  count(state_fips, county_fips, year) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

print(dup_check_bls)

year_check_bls <- bls_clean %>%
  summarise(
    min_year = min(year, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_year = max(year, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(year_check_bls)

n_counties_bls <- bls_clean %>%
  distinct(state_fips, county_fips) %>%
  nrow()

print(n_counties_bls)

write_csv(bls_clean, "output/bls_county_panel.csv")
  
```

```{r}
##Build_panel.R
library(tidyverse)

bea_clean <- read_csv("output/bea_county_panel.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
bls_clean <- read_csv("output/bls_county_panel.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

final_panel <- bea_clean %>%
  full_join(
    bls_clean,
    by = c("state_fips", "county_fips", "year"),
    suffix = c("_bea", "_bls")
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    state_name = coalesce(state_name_bea, state_name_bls),
    county_name = coalesce(county_name_bea, county_name_bls)
  ) %>%
  select(
    state_name,
    county_name,
    state_fips,
    county_fips,
    year,
    unemployment_rate,
    income,
    population,
    income_per_capita
  ) %>%
  arrange(state_fips, county_fips, year)

print(head(final_panel, 10))

dup_check_final <- final_panel %>%
  count(state_fips, county_fips, year) %>%
  filter(n > 1)

print(dup_check_final)

year_check_final <- final_panel %>%
  summarise(
    min_year = min(year, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_year = max(year, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(year_check_final)

n_counties_final <- final_panel %>%
  distinct(state_fips, county_fips) %>%
  nrow()

print(n_counties_final)

missing_pre1990_check <- final_panel %>%
  filter(year < 1990) %>%
  summarise(
    all_unemp_missing = all(is.na(unemployment_rate))
  )

print(missing_pre1990_check)

write_csv(final_panel, "output/county_year_panel.csv")
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)

bea <- fread("../output/bea_county_panel.csv")
bls <- fread("../output/bls_county_panel.csv")
county_year <- fread("../output/county_year_panel.csv")

state_lookup <- tibble::tribble(
  ~state_abbr, ~state_name,
  "AL", "Alabama",
  "AK", "Alaska",
  "AZ", "Arizona",
  "AR", "Arkansas",
  "CA", "California",
  "CO", "Colorado",
  "CT", "Connecticut",
  "DE", "Delaware",
  "DC", "District of Columbia",
  "FL", "Florida",
  "GA", "Georgia",
  "HI", "Hawaii",
  "ID", "Idaho",
  "IL", "Illinois",
  "IN", "Indiana",
  "IA", "Iowa",
  "KS", "Kansas",
  "KY", "Kentucky",
  "LA", "Louisiana",
  "ME", "Maine",
  "MD", "Maryland",
  "MA", "Massachusetts",
  "MI", "Michigan",
  "MN", "Minnesota",
  "MS", "Mississippi",
  "MO", "Missouri",
  "MT", "Montana",
  "NE", "Nebraska",
  "NV", "Nevada",
  "NH", "New Hampshire",
  "NJ", "New Jersey",
  "NM", "New Mexico",
  "NY", "New York",
  "NC", "North Carolina",
  "ND", "North Dakota",
  "OH", "Ohio",
  "OK", "Oklahoma",
  "OR", "Oregon",
  "PA", "Pennsylvania",
  "RI", "Rhode Island",
  "SC", "South Carolina",
  "SD", "South Dakota",
  "TN", "Tennessee",
  "TX", "Texas",
  "UT", "Utah",
  "VT", "Vermont",
  "VA", "Virginia",
  "WA", "Washington",
  "WV", "West Virginia",
  "WI", "Wisconsin",
  "WY", "Wyoming"
)

bea <- bea %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = "state_name") %>%
  relocate(state_abbr, .after = state_name)

bls <- bls %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = "state_name") %>%
  relocate(state_abbr, .after = state_name)

county_year <- county_year %>%
  left_join(state_lookup, by = "state_name") %>%
  relocate(state_abbr, .after = state_name)
```

```{r}
names(bea)
names(bls)
names(county_year)

head(bea[, c("state_name", "state_abbr")], 5)
head(bls[, c("state_name", "state_abbr")], 5)
head(county_year[, c("state_name", "state_abbr")], 5)

fwrite(bea, "../output/bea_county_panel_revised.csv")
fwrite(bls, "../output/bls_county_panel_revised.csv")
fwrite(county_year, "../output/county_year_panel_revised.csv")
```

```{r}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)

bea <- fread("../output/bea_county_panel_revised.csv")
bls <- fread("../output/bls_county_panel_revised.csv")
county_year <- fread("../output/county_year_panel_revised.csv")

bea_vars <- c("income", "population", "income_per_capita")

bea_overview <- tibble(
  panel = "BEA county panel",
  n_rows = nrow(bea),
  n_counties = nrow(distinct(bea, state_fips, county_fips)),
  n_years = n_distinct(bea$year),
  earliest_year = min(bea$year, na.rm = TRUE),
  latest_year = max(bea$year, na.rm = TRUE)
)

bea_availability <- bind_rows(lapply(bea_vars, function(v) {
  x <- bea[[v]]
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    earliest_year_available = min(bea$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    latest_year_available = max(bea$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    nonmissing_n = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

bea_stats <- bind_rows(lapply(bea_vars, function(v) {
  x <- as.numeric(bea[[v]])
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

bea_year_counts <- bea %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_counties = nrow(distinct(cur_data(), state_fips, county_fips)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

kable(bea_overview, caption = "BEA Panel Overview")
kable(bea_availability, caption = "BEA Variable Availability")
kable(bea_stats, digits = 2, caption = "BEA Summary Statistics")
kable(bea_year_counts, caption = "BEA Panel Counts by Year")


bls_vars <- c("unemployment_rate")

bls_overview <- tibble(
  panel = "BLS county panel",
  n_rows = nrow(bls),
  n_counties = nrow(distinct(bls, state_fips, county_fips)),
  n_years = n_distinct(bls$year),
  earliest_year = min(bls$year, na.rm = TRUE),
  latest_year = max(bls$year, na.rm = TRUE)
)

bls_availability <- bind_rows(lapply(bls_vars, function(v) {
  x <- bls[[v]]
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    earliest_year_available = min(bls$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    latest_year_available = max(bls$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    nonmissing_n = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

bls_stats <- bind_rows(lapply(bls_vars, function(v) {
  x <- as.numeric(bls[[v]])
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

bls_year_counts <- bls %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_counties = nrow(distinct(cur_data(), state_fips, county_fips)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

kable(bls_overview, caption = "BLS Panel Overview")
kable(bls_availability, caption = "BLS Variable Availability")
kable(bls_stats, digits = 2, caption = "BLS Summary Statistics")
kable(bls_year_counts, caption = "BLS Panel Counts by Year")


county_year_vars <- c("unemployment_rate", "income", "population", "income_per_capita")

county_year_overview <- tibble(
  panel = "Combined county-year panel",
  n_rows = nrow(county_year),
  n_counties = nrow(distinct(county_year, state_fips, county_fips)),
  n_years = n_distinct(county_year$year),
  earliest_year = min(county_year$year, na.rm = TRUE),
  latest_year = max(county_year$year, na.rm = TRUE)
)

county_year_availability <- bind_rows(lapply(county_year_vars, function(v) {
  x <- county_year[[v]]
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    earliest_year_available = min(county_year$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    latest_year_available = max(county_year$year[!is.na(x)], na.rm = TRUE),
    nonmissing_n = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

county_year_stats <- bind_rows(lapply(county_year_vars, function(v) {
  x <- as.numeric(county_year[[v]])
  tibble(
    variable = v,
    mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    median = median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd = sd(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    min = min(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_obs = sum(!is.na(x))
  )
}))

county_year_counts <- county_year %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(
    n_rows = n(),
    n_counties = nrow(distinct(cur_data(), state_fips, county_fips)),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(year)

kable(county_year_overview, caption = "Combined County-Year Panel Overview")
kable(county_year_availability, caption = "Combined County-Year Variable Availability")
kable(county_year_stats, digits = 2, caption = "Combined County-Year Summary Statistics")
kable(county_year_counts, caption = "Combined County-Year Counts by Year")
```
